chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 308 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ قَلَّمَ أَظْفَارَهُ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ ' لَمْ تَشْعَثْ أَنَامِلُهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.308 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever trims their nails on Jumu’ah will not have disheveled fingertips."
